label: 1523 CE
era_summary: Year 1523 (MDXXIII) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1523 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1523: Spain (Castile and Valencia), 1520-23; France, Navarre-emperor, Spain, England, Italian states (from 1523),pope, 1521-25; Spain-Guatamala, 1522-24. Maddison records GDP/capita 1369 (ESP, 1523) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
